text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what wazzat? Feels like some hidden
power's wellin' up inside of me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Heeey, is this a gift from you three?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, got admit, that was pretty stylin'! Jus'
watch as the great Inari puts all this power to use!
